services_featured.name: Audit & Assurance
services_featured.description: Independent, thorough financial audits that give stakeholders confidence. Public and private sector expertise.

services_secondary.name: Tax Planning & Preparation
services_secondary.description: Proactive tax strategies that minimize your liability. Individual and business returns prepared with precision.

services_accent.name: Estate Planning
services_accent.description: Protect your legacy with smart estate and succession planning. We help business owners transition with confidence.

services_wide.name: Business Valuation & Advisory
services_wide.description: Know what your business is worth. Valuation services for M&A, succession, litigation support, and strategic planning.

about_features.title: Kenneth J. Kolnicki, CPA
about_features.description: Founding partner since 1974. University of Illinois graduate with deep expertise in privately-owned business accounting and tax strategy.

about_features.title: AICPA & Illinois CPA Society
about_features.description: All partners hold active memberships in the American Institute of CPAs and Illinois CPA Society.

about_features.title: Consistent Growth
about_features.description: Over 10% annual fee growth driven by client referrals and quality service — not aggressive sales tactics.

reviews.name: Business Owner
reviews.text: KPW has handled our company's books for over 15 years. They're proactive, responsive, and always find ways to save us money on taxes.

reviews.name: Nonprofit Director
reviews.text: Their audit work is thorough and professional. They understand the unique requirements of public sector organizations and nonprofits.

reviews.name: Restaurant Owner
reviews.text: Switching to KPW was the best financial decision we made. They found deductions our previous CPA missed and their advisory services are top-notch.
